'''鈭歳-m-dh-l''' ('''karamdheloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacuolate|vacuolate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-m-dh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacuolate|vacuolate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-m-dh-l
|-
! Lemma
| karamdheloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiramdheloko|thiramdheloko]] || [[word:jiramdheloko|jiramdheloko]] || [[word:shiramdheloko|shiramdheloko]] || [[word:kiramdheloko|kiramdheloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuramdheloko|thuthuramdheloko]] || [[word:jujuramdheloko|jujuramdheloko]] || [[word:shushuramdheloko|shushuramdheloko]] || [[word:kukuramdheloko|kukuramdheloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuramdheloko|thuramdheloko]] || [[word:juramdheloko|juramdheloko]] || [[word:shuramdheloko|shuramdheloko]] || [[word:kuramdheloko|kuramdheloko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theramdheloko|theramdheloko]] || [[word:jeramdheloko|jeramdheloko]] || [[word:sheramdheloko|sheramdheloko]] || [[word:keramdheloko|keramdheloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoramdheloko|thothoramdheloko]] || [[word:jojoramdheloko|jojoramdheloko]] || [[word:shoshoramdheloko|shoshoramdheloko]] || [[word:kokoramdheloko|kokoramdheloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoramdheloko|thoramdheloko]] || [[word:joramdheloko|joramdheloko]] || [[word:shoramdheloko|shoramdheloko]] || [[word:koramdheloko|koramdheloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoramdheloko|thoramdheloko]] || [[word:joramdheloko|joramdheloko]] || [[word:shoramdheloko|shoramdheloko]] || [[word:koramdheloko|koramdheloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ramdheloko|th忙ramdheloko]] || [[word:j忙ramdheloko|j忙ramdheloko]] || [[word:sh忙ramdheloko|sh忙ramdheloko]] || [[word:k忙ramdheloko|k忙ramdheloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharamdheloko|thatharamdheloko]] || [[word:jajaramdheloko|jajaramdheloko]] || [[word:shasharamdheloko|shasharamdheloko]] || [[word:kakaramdheloko|kakaramdheloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharamdheloko|tharamdheloko]] || [[word:jaramdheloko|jaramdheloko]] || [[word:sharamdheloko|sharamdheloko]] || [[word:karamdheloko|karamdheloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharamdheloko|tharamdheloko]] || [[word:jaramdheloko|jaramdheloko]] || [[word:sharamdheloko|sharamdheloko]] || [[word:karamdheloko|karamdheloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
